## Summary

What does this PR change, and why?

## Checklist

- [ ] `mix test` passes (including `--include statistical
      --include reference_vectors` if the change touches estimators
      or encoding)
- [ ] `mix format` clean
- [ ] `CHANGELOG.md` updated under `[Unreleased]`

## References

If this PR touches algorithmic code (encoding, estimators, merge),
cite the relevant paper section(s) and Hash4j v0.17.0 line numbers
that motivated or validated the change. Algorithmic deviations from
the paper or the reference implementation need justification in
the commit message or PR description.
